name: Empty State
description: A centered display shown when a list or table has no results. Includes an optional illustration, heading, explanatory text, and action button. Used to gracefully handle empty data scenarios and guide users on what to do next.
whenToUse: When a filtered list returns no results
When a data table is empty after search/filter
When a new user has no items yet
When all items have been deleted or archived

components.name: GoabButton
components.purpose: Action to resolve empty state (e.g., 'Clear filters', 'Create new')

components.name: img
components.note: Use simple, relevant illustration - not required

clients-empty-state-cell.purpose: Table cell wrapper - removes padding and border for full-width empty state

example.description: Empty state for table with no search results
example.code:
import emptyStateIllustration from '../assets/empty-state-illustration.svg'; // In table body when filteredItems.length === 0 {filteredItems.length === 0 && items.length > 0 ? (
No results found Try adjusting your search or filters. Clear filters
) : ( // Normal data rows filteredItems.map(item => (...)) )}

variants.name: No results from search
variants.heading: No results found
variants.subline: Try adjusting your search or filters.

variants.name: Empty collection (new user)
variants.heading: No items yet
variants.subline: Create your first item to get started.

variants.name: Data loading failed
variants.heading: Unable to load data
variants.subline: Something went wrong. Please try again.

contentGuidelines.heading: Short, clear statement of the situation (5-7 words max)
contentGuidelines.subline: One sentence explaining what happened or what to do
contentGuidelines.action: Clear verb that resolves the situation
contentGuidelines.illustration: Simple, relevant SVG - avoid complex graphics

considerations: Use colSpan to span full table width when inside tbody
Remove table cell padding/border for clean appearance
Distinguish between 'no search results' (data exists but filtered) vs 'no data' (collection truly empty)
Action button should directly address the situation (clear filters, create new, retry)
Empty state illustration alt='' since it's decorative
